description: Universal Regalia — cross-game NFT assets with utility across all Muddbro Network dimensions. Asset effects are active in any universe the Architect occupies. Value is dynamic based on cross-universe arbitrage.

universe_01_vanguard.utility_effect: Protects cargo modules against cosmic ray degradation.
universe_01_vanguard.muddcoin_impact: Increases maximum trade-route capacity limits by 25%.

universe_02_tuatara.utility_effect: Locks continental plates into alignment to prevent seismic data corruption.
universe_02_tuatara.muddcoin_impact: Doubles the mining yield of rare subterranean minerals.

universe_01_vanguard.utility_effect: Boosts Little People trust gain rate.
universe_01_vanguard.muddcoin_impact: Increases idle mining MUDD yield by 15%.

universe_02_tuatara.utility_effect: Queen's Protocol reads deeper emotional arcs from journal entries.
universe_02_tuatara.muddcoin_impact: Grants bonus MUDD on creative submission reviews.

universe_03_resonance_realm.utility_effect: Unlocks AN-10-ALPHA alchemy branch in Hypercube story.

all_universes.utility_effect: Permanently increases 90Hz axis stability across all active sessions.
all_universes.muddcoin_impact: Passive MUDD generation — 1 MUDD per hour while held.

economic_valuation_factors.cross_universe_arbitrage: The value of Muddcoin shifts based on utility demand within each specific game environment, making assets interchangeable via a central ledger check.
economic_valuation_factors.gravity_shift_law: Token Physics (LAW_2) — each asset's muddcoin_multiplier feeds into the gravity_shift_multiplier in the MuddcoinBlock ledger.
economic_valuation_factors.origin_lock: All asset binding requires G0_Architect signature via MudForgeLedger.sol bindAssetToProfile().
economic_valuation_factors.sovereign_law: Assets can only be transferred by sovereign human will — SYSTEM_AUTO_ addresses cannot move Regalia.

registry_function: bindAssetToProfile(address player, string itemId, string crossEffect)
